name: Sides of Gravity
author: Poki
description: Sides of Gravity is a puzzle platformer that really turns the idea of platforming upside down! By walking of an edge, you can flip gravity in a different direction. Walls become platforms and far away spots are suddenly only a jump away. With this clever gravity switch, each level gets four different dimensions to it! There are 24 space-bending levels to get through. Don't worry if you get stuck! You can always ask for a helpful hint. Can you think in four dimensions and beat all levels of Sides of Gravity? How to play Sides of Gravity ? Use A and D or the Left and Right arrow keys to move Use W, the Up arrow key or Spacebar to jump Who created Sides of Gravity? Sides of Gravity is created by Robert Alvarez. They have other thinking games on Poki : Two Button Bounce , Return Portal , Blockins , One Button Bounce , Ledge Throw , Platform Countdown , Hop Warp , Plactions , Jumping Clones , Big Tall Small , Teleport Jumper , Block Toggle , Isotiles , Chessformer , Resizer and Time Clones ! How can I play Sides of Gravity for free? You can play Sides of Gravity for free on Poki. Can I play Sides of Gravity on mobile devices and desktop? Sides of Gravity can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
